zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Grundy於大約1545年出生在英國坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達時，她的父親Joseph Grundy56歲，母親Frederica Smith53歲。她於1573年4月6日與Robert Leete在英國坎布利其爾格亞特 艾福斯達結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1598年2月17日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Grundy于大约1545年出生在英国坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達时，她的父亲Joseph Grundy56岁，母亲Frederica Smith53岁。她于1573年4月6日与Robert Leete在英国坎布利其爾格亞特 艾福斯達结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1598年2月17日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾蕾托 艾福斯達享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grundy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): from the Middle English personal name Grondi, Grundi, which is probably a metathesized form of Old French Gondri (ancient Germanic Gundric). See Gundry .

variants.name: Grandy
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Grundy  .

variants.name: Gundry
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Gondri, Gundric, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gund ‘battle’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Grundy was born about 1545, in Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Joseph Grundy, was 56 and her mother, Frederica Smith, was 53. She married Robert Leete on 6 April 1573, in Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 17 February 1598, in Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Grundy est née environ 1545, à Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Joseph Grundy, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Frederica Smith, avait 53 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Leete le 6 avril 1573, à Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 février 1598, à Little Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

Lei sposato Robert Leete il 6 aprile 1573, nel Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Grundyが約1545年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアリットル エバースデンで生まれた時，父Joseph Grundyは56歳，母Frederica Smithは53歳であった。1573年4月6日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアグレアト エバースデンでRobert Leeteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1598年2月17日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアリットル エバースデンで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Grundy(이)가 대략 1545년 영국 캄브리지실르 리틀 에버즈든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joseph Grundy(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Frederica Smith(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 1573년 4월 6일 영국 캄브리지실르 그리트 에버즈든에서 Robert Leete(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 2월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 리틀 에버즈든에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Leete em 6 de abril de 1573, em Great Eversden, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Grundy родилась около 1545 г. в местности литл эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Joseph Grundy было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Frederica Smith, 53. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Leete 6 апреля 1573 г. в местности грит эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 17 февраля 1598 г. в местности литл эвирсден, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
